subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Were ye to know in what state, with what attraction and gladness, and with what joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء اگر بدانید که بچه حالتی و بچه جذب و فرحی و بچه سرور
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
